nasb.text: Now on the twenty-fourth day of this month the sons of Israel assembled with fasting, in sackcloth and with dirt upon them.

esv.text: Now on the twenty-fourth day of this month the people of Israel were assembled with fasting and in sackcloth, and with earth on their heads.

cnv.text: 這月二十四日，以色列人聚集，一同禁食，身穿麻衣，頭上蒙灰。

ccb.text: 这月二十四日，以色列人聚集禁食。他们身披麻衣，头撒尘土。
